description_for_human: A test MCP manifest for validating ProxyRank audits.
description_for_model: Fetch and analyze web content for AI orchestrators.

tools.name: fetch_web_content
tools.description: Fetch and parse the HTML content of a web page by URL, returning structured text suitable for AI processing.

url.description: The full URL of the web page to fetch (must include https://)

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return (default: 5000)

output.description: Parsed page content with title and body text
